comments.original: Oh man, when you mention traffic jams you're speaking my language! Our public transport can sometimes feel like someone's playing Tetris – poorly. Motorcycles weaving around cars are normal here; makes crossing streets kinda feels like jumping into double dutch jump rope!

comments.original: Things have definitely shifted; even seeing dudes at salsa classes now - something you'd never expect years back! But still depends on where you are; some places might give side-eye for less 'traditional' hobbies.
comments.anonymized: Things have definitely shifted; even seeing people at dance classes now - something you'd never expect years back! But still depends on where you are; some places might give side-eye for less 'traditional' hobbies.

rounds.anonymized: Things have definitely shifted; even seeing dudes at salsa classes now - something you'd never expect years back! But still depends on where you are; some places might give side-eye for less 'traditional' hobbies.
prefix_anonymized: Oh man, when you mention traffic jams you're speaking my language! Our public transport can sometimes feel like someone's playing Tetris – poorly. Motorcycles weaving around cars are normal here; makes crossing streets kinda feels like jumping into double dutch jump rope!

Bus schedules here? More like suggestions - once watched two buses go by 'cause they were full. Ended up hitching a ride with some street musicians and their guitar serenades made rush hour kinda tolerable!
Even the best planners get blindsided sometimes.
Even unexpected events follow patterns sometimes; unpredictability ain't uniform!
Tax season? More like a challenging time of year...
Pricy software upgrades can sometimes barely improve workflow... overhyped much?
Social expectations sure do add extra layers – not just designs we're dealing with!
Navigating bias takes more than concrete solutions sometimes.
Definitely depends! Some folks here still raise eyebrows...

Things have definitely shifted; even seeing dudes at salsa classes now - something you'd never expect years back! But still depends on where you are; some places might give side-eye for less 'traditional' hobbies.
